name: send_message
description: Send a message to a phone number, chat ID, or contact name via a configured messaging provider like Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal or SMS. Pass the provider name or type ('telegram', 'whatsapp' etc.) in the provider parameter. Call this directly when the user asks to send a message - do not ask for confirmation.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: The messaging provider name (e.g., telegram, whatsapp)

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Recipient identifier: phone number (e.g. '+41791234567'), Telegram chat ID (numeric, e.g. '8559310736'), or contact name (e.g. 'Max Muster') which is then resolved against Klacks contacts.

name: read_messages
description: Read recent messages from messaging providers. Shows incoming and outgoing messages with sender, content, and timestamp.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Filter by provider name (e.g., telegram, whatsapp)

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: Filter by sender phone number or ID

name: list_messaging_providers
description: List all configured messaging providers with their name, type, and enabled status.
